channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Galeries Tower secures first overall pick in PVL Rookie Draft
item.description: Galeries Tower will have the privilege of selecting first overall in the upcoming Premier Volleyball League (PVL) Rookie Draft, as reported in a sports update by ABS-CBN News. This development positio...

item.title: Robert Reich reflects on Memorial Day, honoring a fallen Vietnam War friend and contrasting duty with political rhetoric about military service
item.description: In this Memorial Day opinion essay, former U.S. Labor Secretary Robert Reich reflects on the meaning of service, sacrifice, and civic duty through the memory of his college friend, Robbie, who was kil...

item.title: Mbadi cautions leaders against misinformation on Finance Bill 2026
item.description: National Treasury Cabinet Secretary John Mbadi has called on political leaders in Kenya to avoid spreading propaganda and misleading information regarding the Finance Bill 2026. Speaking in Nairobi, M...

item.title: JioStar executive warns cricket rights may be overvalued as buyer competition shrinks in India
item.description: Uday Shankar, vice-chair of India’s JioStar, has warned that global cricket boards risk overpricing media rights and weakening the sport’s most important revenue market. Speaking about the state of cr...

item.title: Texas GOP Senate Runoff: Ken Paxton Leads John Cornyn in Costly Primary Battle
item.description: In a fiercely contested Republican primary runoff for the U.S. Senate seat in Texas, Attorney General Ken Paxton, who has received endorsement from former President Donald Trump, appears to hold a lea...

item.title: Founder of viral Indian Gen Z account says platform faced crackdown and intimidation
item.description: A viral social media movement in India focusing on Gen Z concerns has come under scrutiny after its founder alleged that the platform was targeted through a crackdown, hacking attempts, and threats di...

item.title: Former SNP chief executive Peter Murrell jailed after admitting £400,000 embezzlement
item.description: Peter Murrell, the estranged husband of former Scottish First Minister Nicola Sturgeon and long-serving chief executive of the Scottish National Party (SNP), has been remanded in custody after pleadin...

item.title: 1938 Richmond tobacco workers protest over wages and housing inequality
item.description: This historical photograph captures a moment of labor protest in Richmond, Virginia, during October 1938, in the midst of the Great Depression. The image shows an unidentified woman standing on a stre...

item.title: AI-driven automation is accelerating software vulnerability discovery and transforming bug bounty programs
item.description: The article examines how artificial intelligence is rapidly reshaping the cybersecurity landscape, particularly in the field of vulnerability discovery and bug bounty programs. Over the past decade, b...

item.title: Megyn Kelly references past allegations involving Donald Trump during podcast appearance
item.description: During a recent appearance on the Hodgetwins Podcast, media personality Megyn Kelly made controversial remarks about former President Donald Trump, including renewed references to long-standing person...

item.title: Congress-DMK tensions rise after Udhayanidhi Stalin criticises Congress over alliance with Vijay’s TVK
item.description: The political relationship between the Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (DMK) and the Indian National Congress has come under strain following sharp exchanges over recent alliance decisions in Tamil Nadu. Th...

item.title: Concerns Raised Over Maintenance and Biodiversity Decline at Kirstenbosch, Alongside Western Cape Flood Recovery and Hospital Governance Issues
item.description: Concerns have been raised about the condition of the Kirstenbosch National Botanical Garden, one of South Africa’s most internationally recognised botanical sites. According to long-time supporter Jam...

item.title: Army widow recalls nationwide tribute during husband’s final journey home
item.description: The article is a personal reflection by Amy King, an Army widow, who recounts the tragic loss of her husband, Captain Andy King, who died in a Humvee accident during an Army Reserve training exercise ...

item.title: Historical Wooden Water Pipelines in the 19th and Early 20th Centuries
item.description: This article explores the historical use of wooden water pipelines, a once-common infrastructure solution used from the 16th century through the early 20th century across Europe and North America. The...

item.title: Registrar reviews hate speech allegations involving CCM and Chadema as legal assessment continues
item.description: The Office of the Registrar of Political Parties in Tanzania is currently carrying out a detailed legal assessment following separate allegations of hate speech involving the ruling party CCM and the ...

item.title: Xi Jinping and PM Shehbaz reaffirm China-Pakistan strategic partnership and discuss regional peace efforts
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping met Pakistan’s Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif in Beijing, where both leaders reaffirmed the long-standing strategic partnership between China and Pakistan. Xi described the...

item.title: Couple disagrees over staying out late and expectations about future parenting lifestyle
item.description: This advice column explores a recurring conflict in a romantic relationship centered on differing social habits and expectations about nightlife, both in the present and in anticipation of future pare...

item.title: Residents of Parola Compound urge probe into massive Binondo fire displacing over 2,000 families
item.description: Residents of Parola Compound in San Nicolas, Binondo, Manila are calling for a thorough investigation into a major fire that broke out on May 23, 2026, and displaced 2,134 families. The fire, which la...

item.title: How technology and automation are reshaping youth employment challenges
item.description: Young people across the country are increasingly facing serious challenges in securing employment as rapid technological advancement continues to transform the job market. The article explains that al...

item.title: Senate appoints Marcoleta and Jinggoy Estrada as vice chairpersons of Blue Ribbon Committee
